name: Can I sue machine maker if it malfunctioned at my job?
description: Yes, third-party liability against manufacturer possible beyond workers' comp.

mainEntity.name: Can I sue machine maker if it malfunctioned at my job?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, third-party liability against manufacturer possible beyond workers' comp.
acceptedAnswer.description: **Yes, pursue third-party claim against manufacturer alongside workers' comp in Utah and Idaho.** Exclusive remedy is employer only; sue negligent others for extra damages[2][4]. Two-year statute in Idaho. Prove defect caused injury. Attorney coordinates both.
